fields.name: VSYSMIN_5:0
fields.description:
Minimal System Voltage which must be less than VREG in REG01.
During POR, the device reads the resistance tie to PROG pin, to identify the default battery cell count and determine the default power on VSYSMIN list below:
1s: 3.5V
2s: 7V
3s: 9V
4s: 12V

fields.name: VREG_10:0
fields.description:
Battery Voltage Limit:
During POR, the device reads the resistance tie to PROG pin, to identify the default battery cell count and determine the default power-on battery voltage regulation limit:
1s: 4.2V
2s: 8.4V
3s: 12.6V
4s: 16.8V

fields.name: ICHG_8:0
fields.description:
Charge Current Limit
During POR, the device reads the resistance tie to PROG pin, to identify the default battery cell count and determine the default power-on battery charging current: 1A

fields.name: VINDPM_7:0
fields.description:
Absolute VINDPM Threshold
VINDPM register is reset to 3600mV upon adapter unplugged and it is set to the value based on the VBUS measurement when the adapter plugs in. It is not reset by the REG_RST and the WATCHDOG

fields.name: IINDPM_8:0
fields.description:
Based on D+/D- detection results:
USB SDP = 500mA
USB CDP = 1.5A
USB DCP = 3.25A
Adjustable High Voltage DCP = 1.5A
Unknown Adapter = 3A
Non-Standard Adapter = 1A/2A/2.1A/2.4A

fields.name: VBAT_LOWV_1:0
fields.description: Battery voltage thresholds for the transition from precharge to fast charge, which is defined as a ratio of battery regulation limit (VREG)

fields.name: REG_RST
fields.description: Reset registers to default values and reset timer

fields.name: STOP_WD_CHG
fields.description: Defines whether a watchdog timer expiration will disable charging

values.0h: WD timer expiration keeps existing EN_CHG setting

fields.name: CELL_1:0
fields.description: At POR, the charger reads the PROG pin resistance to determine the battery cell count and update this CELL bits accordingly.

values.0h: Trickle charge, pre-charge and fast charge timer NOT slowed by 2X during input DPM or thermal regulation.
values.1h: Trickle charge, pre-charge and fast charge timer slowed by 2X during input DPM or thermal regulation (default)

fields.name: EN_AUTO_IBATDIS
fields.description: Enable the auto battery discharging during the battery OVP fault

values.0h: The charger will NOT apply a discharging current on BAT during battery OVP
values.1h: The charger will apply a discharging current on BAT during battery OVP
Force the charger to apply a discharging current on BAT regardless the battery OVP status

fields.name: FORCE_ICO
fields.description:
Force start input current optimizer (ICO)
Note: This bit can only be set and returns 0 after ICO starts. This bit only valid when EN_ICO = 1

fields.name: EN_HIZ
fields.description:
Enable HIZ mode.
This bit will be also reset to 0, when the adapter is plugged in at VBUS.

fields.name: EN_BACKUP
fields.description: Enables backup mode where OTG automatically engages when VBUS droops below voltage set in REG10.

fields.name: VBUS_BACKUP_1:0
fields.description: The thresholds to trigger the backup mode, defined as a ratio of VINDPM

values.1h: Reset (this bit goes back to 0 after timer resets)
Force D+/D- algorithm, when D+/D- detection is done, this bit will be reset to 0

values.0h: Disable D+/D- detection when VBUS is plugged-in
values.1h: Enable D+/D- detection when VBUS is plugged-in (default)

fields.name: SDRV_CTRL_1:0
fields.description:
SFET control
The external ship FET control logic to force the device enter different modes.

fields.name: SDRV_DLY
fields.description: Delay time added to the taking action in bit [2:1] of the SFET control

fields.name: DIS_ACDRV
fields.description: When this bit is set, the charger will force both EN_ACDRV1=0 and EN_ACDRV2=0

fields.name: WKUP_DLY
DIS_LDO
fields.description: Disable BATFET LDO mode in pre-charge stage.

fields.name: EN_ACDRV2
fields.description:
External ACFET2-RBFET2 gate driver control
At POR, if the charger detects that there is no ACFET2-RBFET2 populated, this bit will be locked at 0

fields.name: EN_ACDRV1
fields.description:
External ACFET1-RBFET1 gate driver control
At POR, if the charger detects that there is no ACFET1-RBFET1 populated, this bit will be locked at 0

fields.name: PWM_FREQ
fields.description: Switching frequency selection, this bit POR default value is based on the PROG pin strapping.

fields.name: DIS_VSYS_SHORT
fields.description: Disable forward mode VSYS short hiccup protection.

fields.name: DIS_VOTG_UVP
fields.description: Disable OTG mode VOTG UVP hiccup protection.

fields.name: FORCE_VINDPM_DET
fields.description:
Force VINDPM detection
Note: only when VBAT>VSYSMIN, this bit can be set to 1. Once the VINDPM auto detection is done, this bits returns to 0.

values.1h: Force the converter stop switching, and ADC measures the VBUS voltage without input current, then the charger updates the VINDPM register accordingly.

fields.name: SFET_PRESENT
fields.description:
The user has to set this bit based on whether a ship FET is populated or not. The POR default value is 0, which means the charger does not support all the features associated with the ship FET. The register bits list below all are locked at 0.
EN_BATOC=0
SDRV_CTRL=00
When this bit is set to 1, the register bits list above become programmable, and the charger can support the features associated with the ship FET

fields.name: EN_IBAT
fields.description: IBAT discharge current sensing enable for ADC in battery only/HiZ mode

values.0h: Disable the IBAT discharge sensing at battery only/HiZ (default)
values.1h: Enable the IBAT discharge sensing at battery only/HiZ using higher Iq

fields.name: IBAT_REG_1:0
fields.description: Battery discharging current regulation in OTG mode

fields.name: EN_IINDPM
fields.description: Enable the internal IINDPM register input current regulation and IOTG register for OTG output current regulation

fields.name: EN_EXTILIM
fields.description: Enable the external ILIM_HIZ pin input current regulation

fields.name: EN_BATOC
fields.description: Enable the battery discharging current OCP

fields.name: VOC_PCT_2:0
fields.description: To set the VINDPM as a percentage of the VBUS open circuit voltage when the VOC measurement is done.

fields.name: VOC_DLY_1:0
fields.description: After the converter stops switching, the time delay before the VOC is measured.

fields.name: VOC_RATE_1:0
fields.description: The time interval two VBUS open circuit voltage measurements.

fields.name: EN_MPPT
fields.description: Enable the MPPT to measure the VBUS open circuit voltage.

fields.name: VBUS_PD_EN
fields.description: Enable VBUS pull down resistor (6k Ohm)

fields.name: BKUP_ACFET1_ON
fields.description: When the charger is operated in backup mode, ACFET1 is off. Setting this bit to 1, the charger clears the EN_BACKUP bit to 0, sets DIS_ACDRV=0 and EN_ACDRV1=1 to turn on the ACFET1.

values.1h: To turn on ACFET1 in backup mode

fields.name: JEITA_VSET_2:0
fields.description: JEITA high temperature range (TWARM - THOT) charge voltage setting

fields.name: JEITA_ISETH_1:0
fields.description: JEITA high temperature range (TWARM - THOT) charge current setting

fields.name: JEITA_ISETC_1:0
fields.description: JEITA low temperature range (TCOLD - TCOOL) charge current setting

fields.name: TS_COOL_1:0
fields.description: JEITA VT2 comparator voltage rising thresholds as a percentage of REGN. The corresponding temperature in the brackets is achieved when a 103AT NTC thermistor is used, RT1=5.24kΩ and RT2=30.31kΩ.

fields.name: TS_WARM_1:0
fields.description: JEITA VT3 comparator voltage falling thresholds as a percentage of REGN. The corresponding temperature in the brackets is achieved when a 103AT NTC thermistor is used, RT1=5.24kΩ and RT2=30.31kΩ.

fields.name: BHOT_1:0
fields.description: OTG mode TS HOT temperature threshold

fields.name: BCOLD
fields.description: OTG mode TS COLD temperature threshold

fields.name: TS_IGNORE
fields.description: Ignore the TS feedback, the charger considers the TS is always good to allow the charging and OTG modes, all the four TS status bits always stay at 0000 to report the normal condition.

fields.name: ICO_ILIM_8:0
fields.description: Input Current Limit obtained from ICO or ILIM_HIZ pin setting

fields.name: IINDPM_STAT
fields.description: IINDPM status (forward mode) or IOTG status (OTG mode)

values.1h: In IINDPM regulation or IOTG regulation

fields.name: VINDPM_STAT
fields.description: VINDPM status (forward mode) or VOTG status (OTG mode)

values.1h: In VINDPM regulation or VOTG regualtion

fields.name: VBUS_STAT_3:0
fields.description:
VBUS status bits
0h: No Input or BHOT or BCOLD in OTG mode
1h: USB SDP (500mA)
2h: USB CDP (1.5A)
3h: USB DCP (3.25A)
4h: Adjustable High Voltage DCP (HVDCP) (1.5A)
5h: Unknown adaptor (3A)
6h: Non-Standard Adapter (1A/2A/2.1A/2.4A)
7h: In OTG mode
8h: Not qualified adaptor
9h: Reserved
Ah: Reserved
Bh: Device directly powered from VBUS
Ch: Backup Mode
Dh: Reserved
Eh: Reserved
Fh: Reserved

values.0h: BC1.2 or non-standard detection NOT complete
The D+/D- detection is NOT started yet, or the detection is done

fields.name: VBAT_PRESENT_STAT
fields.description:
Battery present status (V
BAT
> V
BAT_UVLOZ
)
BAT
NOT present
BAT
present

fields.name: ADC_DONE_STAT
fields.description: ADC Conversion Status (in one-shot mode only)

fields.name: VSYS_STAT
fields.description:
VSYS Regulation Status (forward mode)
BAT
> V
SYSMIN
)
BAT
< V
SYSMIN
)

values.0h: Not in VSYSMIN regulation (V BAT > V SYSMIN )
values.1h: In VSYSMIN regulation (V BAT < V SYSMIN )

fields.name: VBATOTG_LOW_STAT
fields.description: The battery voltage is too low to enable OTG mode.

values.0h: The battery voltage is high enough to enable the OTG operation
values.1h: The battery volage is too low to enable the OTG operation

fields.name: TS_COLD_STAT
fields.description: The TS temperature is in the cold range, lower than T1.

values.0h: TS status is NOT in cold range
values.1h: TS status is in cold range

fields.name: TS_COOL_STAT
fields.description: The TS temperature is in the cool range, between T1 and T2.

values.0h: TS status is NOT in cool range
values.1h: TS status is in cool range

fields.name: TS_WARM_STAT
fields.description: The TS temperature is in the warm range, between T3 and T5.

values.0h: TS status is NOT in warm range
values.1h: TS status is in warm range

fields.name: TS_HOT_STAT
fields.description: The TS temperature is in the hot range, higher than T5.

values.0h: TS status is NOT in hot range
values.1h: TS status is in hot range
Device in battery discharging current regulation
Device in SYS short circuit protection
IINDPM / IOTG signal rising edge detected
VINDPM / VOTG regulation signal rising edge detected
WD timer signal rising edge detected
Poor source status rising edge detected
Any change in PG_STAT even (adapter good qualification or adapter good going away)

values.0h: D+/D- detection is NOT started or still ongoing

fields.name: ADC_DONE_FLAG
fields.description: ADC conversion flag (only in one-shot mode)

values.1h: Fast charge timer expired rising edge detected
Trickle charger timer expired rising edge detected
Pre-charge timer expired rising edge detected
Top off timer expired rising edge detected

fields.name: VBATOTG_LOW_FLAG
fields.description: VBAT too low to enable OTG flag

values.1h: VBAT falls below the threshold to enable the OTG mode
TS across cold temperature (T1) is detected
TS across cool temperature (T2) is detected
TS across warm temperature (T3) is detected
TS across hot temperature (T5) is detected

Stop switching due to system over-voltage
Stop OTG due to VBUS over voltage
Stop OTG due to VBUS under-voltage
TS shutdown signal rising threshold detected

values.0h: Enter IINDPM / IOTG does produce INT pulse
values.1h: Enter IINDPM / IOTG does NOT produce INT pulse

values.0h: Enter VINDPM / VOTG does produce INT pulse
values.1h: Enter VINDPM / VOTG does NOT produce INT pulse

fields.description: I2C watch dog timer mask flag

values.0h: I2C watch dog timer expired does produce INT pulse
values.1h: I2C watch dog timer expired does NOT produce INT pulse

values.1h: Poor source detected does NOT produce INT

entering TREG does NOT produce INT

values.1h: Top off timer expire does NOT produce INT

values.1h: VBAT falling below the threshold to enable the OTG mode, does NOT produce INT

fields.name: IBUS_ADC_15:0
fields.description:
IBUS ADC reading
Reported in 2 's Complement.
When the current is flowing from VBUS to PMID, IBUS ADC reports positive value, and when the current is flowing from PMID to VBUS, IBUS ADC reports negative value.

fields.name: IBAT_ADC_15:0
fields.description:
IBAT ADC reading
Reported in 2 's Complement.
.
The IBAT ADC reports the battery charging current in forward mode and the battery discharging current in OTG and battery only (HiZ) mode if EN_IBAT bit in REG14[5]=1. The sign bit is 0b for charging current and 1b for discharging current.

fields.name: VBAT_ADC_15:0
fields.description: The battery remote sensing voltage (VBATP) ADC reading

fields.name: TDIE_ADC_15:0
fields.description:
TDIE ADC reading
Reported in 2 's Complement.
